form.formComment: Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.0 len at Launceston Cl3 March 27 over 1200m in soft going defeating Novalargo carrying 59kg at $6. The start before that raced on the pace before fading to run last of 7 at Launceston Cl4 Sw on February 25 over 1400m, 6 len behind Agnete with 57kg at $5. Sure to go close.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 0.5 len at Launceston Cl4 Sw February 20 over 1100m defeating Mastretta with 55kg at $4.40. Second run from a spell 3rd in a small field at Launceston Cl4 Sw on March 20 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Mastretta with 57kg at $2.40. Profiles nicely. Fitter and hard to beat.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Launceston Cl3 on March 27 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Obviously Good carrying 55.5kg at $7.
